titleStmt.title: SII 23.481: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 481. (A.R. No. 481 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Ōṅkārēśvara temple—on the west wall of the central shrine Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 38

summary.p: This is evidently an inscription of Kulōttuṅga III whose officer (tiruma ndira-vōlai) Rājanārāyaṇa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ has signed the royal order granting a paḍugai land in the village as tirunāmattukkāṇi and ūrkīḻiṟaiyili to the temple of Ōṅkārīśvaramuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
haraḥ-svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉerimeṉ koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ brahmadeśattu U
ṭaiyār Oṅkāri Īśvara muṭaiyār koyil tevakaṉmikkum śrīmākeśva rak kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉukkum Irā
la coḻapurattellaiyil kāverikkulaikku vaṭakku vikkirama coḻaṉ mātirimaṅkalattellaikku kiḻakku pallavanārāyaṇapu
katevipurattu Ellaikku meṟkkuppaṭṭa paṭukai nilam Ināyyaṉār kku tirunāmattuk kāṇiyum Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyum Ākavum Ivūra var cāta
m kaṇakkuṭuttu tu varākaṉ[?]oṉṟum Ivarkaḷ tanta cātaṉappaṭiye Aṉupavikka veṇum Eṉṟu
capparayaṉ namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉ ṉom Ivviṭam Ivarkaḷ tanta cātaṉappaṭiyē tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyum Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyum Āka muṉpu Aṉupavittu varukiṟapaṭiye Aṉupavikka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai Irācanārāyaṇa muventave ḷāṉ valla
vataraiyar Eḻuttu viḻiñattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu vayaṉāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu cittaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu Iyāṇ
ṭu muppatteṭṭu nāḷ nūṟṟumuppattoṉpatu
Digital edition of SII 23.481 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
